title: Belongs-to associations
description: Given a table with a belongs_to association defined, when I resolve the association for a record, it should look up the parent record by PK in the foreign table. Spec: features/associations/belongs_to.feature

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Standup: beginning belongs_to association behavior. Next: add step defs + table support to resolve parent via PK lookup in both langs. Blockers: none yet.
